creator: Ultima1252@gmail.com
text:
This issue is with ordering in the /etc/rc.subr file. When the rc script runs, it will run the limits command on cd then run prog without limits, running limits on the cd command causes cd to fail which is causing the program itself to fail to start.

This problem cannot be fixed within the port because it is a base issue. I have opened a bug for the rc.subr with an attached fix. bug #212493
